PreToolUse :: Agent.reason: Current layered agent-governance stack; prevent more Agent pre-hook fan-out until dispatcher consolidation lands.

SessionStart :: *.reason: Global startup hooks are intentionally broad today; includes session-capture-init for ambient reflection pipeline.

PostToolUse :: Agent.reason: Agent post-hooks now include AI consult plus GTM and OKR telemetry; hold the line here until the post-agent chain is consolidated.

PreToolUse :: Bash.reason: Bash pre-hooks now include domain guards for Salesforce, HubSpot, and Marketo plus core governance; hold this ceiling until a shared dispatcher replaces the layered chain.

UserPromptSubmit :: *.reason: Prompt-time routing, deprecation notices, and ambient candidate extraction are global today.

PreToolUse :: Write.reason: Write hooks are already layered across domains; this budget prevents quiet growth.

PostToolUse :: Bash.reason: Post-Bash hooks are now dispatched per domain; fail any attempt to reintroduce broad Bash post-hook fan-out.

Stop :: *.reason: Global stop hooks include ambient hook-error observer and flush trigger for session-end reflection.

PostToolUse :: *.reason: PostToolUse catch-all includes ambient candidate extractor, hook-error observer, and flush trigger.
